values.name: public_host
values.description: Host (when URI is an IP address)

values.name: private_host
values.description: Host (when URI is an IP address)

values.name: max_subscriptions_per_stream
values.description: Maximum number of symbols per connection

values.name: books_depth
values.description: Depth defines what 'books' channel to subscribe to (some require authentication)

values.name: books_use_public
values.description: Only use publicly available data sources (not requiring VIP membership)?

values.name: disconnect_timeout
values.description: Disconnect if connection has been silent for this period
